name: Droidbox
description: Droidbox (Honeypot). Tool: https://code.google.com/archive/p/droidbox/. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #591 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map Droidbox output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved Droidbox output file to parse instead of running it live.
